goal: sum[A](map[T, A](left, f)) + sum[A](map[T, A](right, f)) = sum[A](map[T, A](left + right, f))
sum[A](map[T, A](right, f)) + sum[A](map[T, A](left, f)) = sum[A](map[T, A](left, f)) + sum[A](map[T, A](right, f))

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](sum[A](map[T, A](right, f)), sum[A](map[T, A](left, f)))

goal: sum[A](map[T, A](list_take[T](items, n), f)) + sum[A](map[T, A](items.drop(n), f)) = sum[A](map[T, A](items, f))
sum[A](map[T, A](items.drop(n), f)) + sum[A](map[T, A](list_take[T](items, n), f)) = sum[A](map[T, A](list_take[T](items, n), f)) + sum[A](map[T, A](items.drop(n), f))

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](sum[A](map[T, A](list_take[T](items, n), f)), sum[A](map[T, A](items.drop(n), f)))

map[T, A](List.nil[T], lib(functions).identity_fn[T -> A](f)) != List.nil[A]
function[T0, T1](x0: List[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or map[T0, T1](x0, x1) = List.nil[T1] }[T, A](List.nil[T], lib(functions).identity_fn[T -> A](f))
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or T0.0 = sum[T0](x0) }[A](List.nil[A])
function[T0: AddCommMonoid](x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> T0) { sum[T0](map[Nat, T0](x0.range, x1)) = partial[T0](x1, x0) }[A](a, f)

goal: partial[A](f, b) = partial[A](f, a) + sum[A](map[Nat, A](a.until(b), f))
partial[A](f, a) + sum[A](map[Nat, A](a.until(b), f)) = partial[A](f, b)
sum[A](map[Nat, A](a.until(b), f)) + partial[A](f, a) = partial[A](f, a) + sum[A](map[Nat, A](a.until(b), f))

p.c: function[T0: lib(add_comm_semigroup).AddCommSemigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 + x1 = x1 + x0 }[A](partial[A](f, a), sum[A](map[Nat, A](a.until(b), f)))

goal: sum[A](map[Nat, A](a.until(b), f)) + partial[A](f, a) = partial[A](f, b)
